        五年前，几个神秘人绑架了萧龙天，将他挖眼刺耳打碎手脚！幸得师父相救，他才活了下来！
        五年后，萧龙天带着一身通天本事下山！你是龙国第一武道高手？对不起，你可以退居第二了。你是龙国第一神医？抱歉，在我的医术面前，你还要再学几十年。
        在天下风云突变之际，萧龙天横扫一切强敌，屠尽所有仇人！最终，他在绝色美人相伴下，站在了世界之巅，俾睨天下，淡看风云！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/c3dd7dddf9cc35639ffaaabfeca9f53d","author":"西瓜在飞","author_id":"","book_id":"7258299433815641128","book_name":"无敌师弟，不要停！","book_short_name":"龙尊下山","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181810","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":124,"name":"都市修真","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=124&name=都市修真&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":26,"name":"神医","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=26&name=神医&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":845,"name":"高手下山","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=845&name=高手下山&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7258299439423423031","read_count":"38213","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3972013"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"1914","tags":"都市修真,都市,神医,多女主,无敌,打脸,高手下山","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/4cc10570ef48b111467ccc6f8173c636~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779251048&x-signature=5KNqY%2By7CM%2Fg28dtW%2Fwv%2BmCprNw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1881977473735927","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"40"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321122
